message:
perf(ftui-text): add #[inline] to trivial accessors in rope/view/width_cache (bd-2zpss)

Add #[inline] to 20 trivial accessor methods for cross-crate inlining:
- rope.rs: len_bytes, len_chars, len_lines, is_empty, char_to_byte,
  byte_to_char, char_to_line, line_to_char, byte_to_line_col, line_col_to_byte
- view.rs: wrap_mode, width, source_line_count, virtual_line_count,
  max_width, lines
- width_cache.rs: stats, len, is_empty, capacity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
